name: Chicken Cordon Bleu
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound chicken breasts if they're too thick.
2. Place a cheese and ham slice on each breast within 1/2 inch of the edge.
3. Fold edges of chicken over filling and secure with toothpicks.
4. Mix flour and paprika and coat chicken.
5. Heat butter in a skillet and cook chicken until browned on all sides.
6. Add wine and bouillon to the skillet.
7. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 30 minutes.
8. Remove toothpicks and transfer breasts to a warm platter.
9. Blend cornstarch with cream and whisk slowly into the skillet.
10. Cook, stirring until thickened, then pour over chicken.
